personas.name: Clara
pain_points: Skin looking fatigued due to high-stress work weeks
Lack of time for complex multi-step beauty routines
Need for makeup that transitions seamlessly from the boardroom to evening events
Frustrated by products that feel heavy or cakey under office lighting
media_habits: Follows premium lifestyle and business influencers on LinkedIn
Consumes 'Day in the Life' Reels of high-achieving women
Subscribes to digital editions of Vogue and Harper’s Bazaar
Watches high-production value morning routine content
personas.buying_motivation: The desire for a polished, professional aesthetic and products that provide an immediate confidence boost through high-performance ingredients.
personas.persona_summary: Clara is a high-achieving professional who views her beauty routine as a vital part of her professional armor. She values efficiency and prestige, seeking out luxury products that make her look rested and radiant despite her demanding schedule.

personas.name: Elena
pain_points: Dull skin caused by long hours in front of digital screens
Preference for 'no-makeup' makeup that still looks elevated
Desire for a sensory, calming ritual to start and end her day
Difficulty finding products that photograph well for social media without filters
media_habits: Active on aesthetic Pinterest boards and Instagram saved folders
Engages with 'Get Ready With Me' (GRWM) Reels emphasizing skin prep
Listens to wellness and self-improvement podcasts
Follows niche, high-end skincare aesthetic accounts
personas.buying_motivation: Emotional resonance and the sensory experience of the product; she wants her skincare to feel like a meditative, luxurious ritual.
personas.persona_summary: Elena is a visually-driven creative who prioritizes the 'glow-from-within' look and the emotional benefit of her beauty routine. She is drawn to Luma Skin for its soft neutrals and gold accents, seeing the collection as an extension of her curated, minimalist lifestyle.

personas.name: Sophia
pain_points: Maintaining a youthful, luminous glow for social appearances
Loss of natural skin radiance due to environmental factors
Finding premium products that feel exclusive and high-status
Need for products that enhance her features for high-definition photography
media_habits: Views Instagram Stories of luxury fashion and jewelry brands
Follows celebrity makeup artists and luxury dermatologists
Engages with high-budget travel and event content
Regularly checks 'What’s New' sections on luxury retail platforms
personas.buying_motivation: Exclusivity and social validation; she buys products that signal status and ensure she looks flawless at every public engagement.
personas.persona_summary: Sophia is a sophisticated socialite who is always in the public eye and demands the best in skincare and makeup to maintain her image. She seeks out Luma Skin for its premium positioning and its ability to provide a polished, radiant finish that complements her high-fashion wardrobe.
